nasb.text: he is a leprous man, he is unclean. The priest shall surely pronounce him unclean; his infection is on his head.

esv.text: he is a leprous man, he is unclean. The priest must pronounce him unclean; his disease is on his head.

cnv.text: 那人就是患了痲風病，就不潔淨；祭司要宣布他為不潔淨，那人頭上染了痲風。

ccb.text: 就是得了麻风病，那人是不洁净的。祭司要宣布那人是不洁净的。
